name: Deployments - ATSC : NextGen TV
snippet: In August 2025, Brazil adopted ATSC 3.0 technologies as the basis for its next-generation television system (branded “DTV+,” also known as TV 3.0).

name: Spotlight ATSC 3.0 - ATSC : NextGen TV - ATSC.org
snippet: ATSC 3.0 is the next generation terrestrial broadcast system designed from the ground up to improve the television viewing experience.

name: ATSC 3.0 - Wikipedia
snippet:
ATSC 3.0 is a major version of the ATSC standards for terrestrial television broadcasting created by the Advanced Television Systems Committee (ATSC).

name: HC2 Broadcasting supports 5G Broadcast alongside ATSC 3.0
snippet: The 5G Broadcast standard is complementary to ATSC 3.0, not in competition with it. This sentiment is echoed in HC2 Broadcasting's petition to the FCC.

name: Point/Counterpoint: 5G Broadcast vs. NextGen TV - TVTechnology
